reason: Manual review required: HOLD-class primitive(s): SPL Token Approve / ApproveChecked.

findings.label: SPL Token Approve / ApproveChecked
findings.detail: Matched Approve on spl-token; instruction discriminator 4 (Approve).
findings.mapsToLoss: Grants a delegate authority to spend tokens from the account; a malicious delegate can silently drain it afterward.
